title: pelargonium × exile
intro: Pelargonium × exile, also known as the Exile Geranium, is a hybrid plant within the Pelargonium genus, which is commonly known for its ornamental and medicinal properties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of rosmarinic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × exile include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × exile typically involve infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health concerns.
